REFINED_PROMPT_ONLY_INSIDE:
Continue improving the tg-notify-deleted-messages project from its current branch state. The project is already substantially refactored and well-tested; do not waste time reconciling obsolete baselines.
Current verified baseline: - `python -m pytest --cov=app/src --cov-report=term-missing -q` - `236 passed` - total coverage is `91%` - highest-value remaining gaps are: - `app/src/packages/bootstrap.py` (`75%`) - `app/src/packages/background_jobs.py` (`87%`) - `app/src/packages/http.py` (`94%`)
Primary goal: - make one more safe, meaningful cleanup/refactor/testing pass that improves real maintainability or coverage without destabilizing the app
What "good" looks like: 1. Prefer real modularity or testability improvements over cosmetic churn 2. Focus on the remaining weak or high-complexity modules, especially `bootstrap.py`, `background_jobs.py`, or `http.py` 3. Add or tighten focused tests when they cover real behavior 4. Keep the app runnable; avoid giant rewrites 5. Make incremental, reviewable commits and push validated progress
Constraints: - do not assume the old `34 passed` / `18%` baseline is relevant; it is stale - do not pad coverage with meaningless tests - prefer dependency-injected helpers and pure functions over patch-heavy tests - if you find the codebase already in a good state, choose the next smallest meaningful improvement instead of inventing a rewrite
Validation expectations: - keep `python -m pytest --cov=app/src --cov-report=term-missing -q` green - preserve or improve the current `91%` total coverage - if behavior or module boundaries change, update tests and docs/imports accordingly
Stop condition: - stop only when the task is complete or when there is no more clearly safe, meaningful progress to make
SPECIFIC ACTIONABLE STEPS:
For bootstrap.py (75% coverage): 1. Add tests for TELETHON_OVERRIDE_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE and TELEGRAM_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE environment variable handling (lines 88-92) 2. Add tests for bot configuration when TARGET_CHAT_IS_ID is set (lines 153-167) 3. Add tests for error handling in client_main_loop_job when notification functions are None (lines 198-199, 204-205) 4. Add tests for edge cases in worker_function and make_sync_closer (lines 262-264) 5. Add tests for the create_app_and_start_jobs function flow (lines 303-421)
For background_jobs.py (87% coverage): 1. Add tests for the exception handling paths in clean_old_messages_loop (lines 52->34, 57-58) 2. Add tests for the preload_messages status reporting functionality (lines 87-92) 3. Add tests for the dialog processing loop when no dialogs are present (lines 129, 131) 4. Add tests for the preloaded messages counting and reporting logic (lines 139->143, 145)
For http.py (94% coverage): 1. Add tests for bearer token validation edge cases (lines 106-109) 2. Add tests for the health check retry mechanism and consecutive failure logic (lines 201->219, 213-218) 3. Add tests for the suicide_after_consecutive_health_failures functionality (line 226)
VERIFICATION COMMANDS: - After making changes, run: `python -m pytest --cov=app/src --cov-report=term-missing -q` - Ensure total coverage remains at or above 91% - Ensure all 236 existing tests continue to pass - Run the application briefly to ensure basic functionality works: `docker-compose up -d app` then `docker-compose stop app`
